patches.patch:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: argocd-repo-server
spec:
  template:
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: argocd-repo-server
        resources:
          limits:
            memory: 2Gi
          requests:
            cpu: 750m
            memory: 1Gi
target:
  kind: Deployment
  name: argocd-repo-server
